description: Recto (secondary use): Copy of a letter attributed to the prophet Muḥammad, directed to a group of Jews, probably those of Khaybar and Maqnā. Cf. T-S AS 155.397 (PGPID 37995) and T-S 16.353 (PGPID 7491) and parallels in literary sources. In Judaeo-Arabic. Verso (original use): Fragment from the upper left corner of a petition or official letter in Arabic script. ASE
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
